content: I mistakenly claimed task 's1' when I should have claimed 's4' (Competitor analysis: OpenCode). I haven't started work on s1. Could you please: 1) unassign s1 from me or mark it available, and 2) assign s4 to me (agent ID tm-004)? Alternatively, tell me how you'd like me to proceed.

I mistakenly claimed task 's4' (OpenCode) instead of my assigned task 's2' (claude-code-sourcemap). I have not started work on s4. Please either reassign s2 to me or unassign s4 so I can claim s2. I will wait for guidance before proceeding.

Requesting reassignment: I (tm-001) received task s2 earlier and currently have it claimed. The user has asked me to complete task s1 (Product review and gap analysis), but s1 is currently assigned to tm-004. Can you reassign s1 to tm-001 so I can complete it? If reassignment is not possible, please confirm whether I should proceed with my current task s2 instead. Thanks.
